contacts.name: cURL
contacts.panelHtml:
GET
/v1/contacts
curl -G https://api.protocol.chat/v1/contacts \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer {token}" \
  -d active=true \
  -d limit=10

contacts.name: JavaScript
contacts.panelHtml:
GET
/v1/contacts
import ApiClient from '@example/protocol-api'

const client = new ApiClient(token)

await client.contacts.list()

contacts.name: Python
contacts.panelHtml:
GET
/v1/contacts
from protocol_api import ApiClient

client = ApiClient(token)

client.contacts.list()

contacts.name: PHP
contacts.panelHtml:
GET
/v1/contacts
$client = new \Protocol\ApiClient($token);

$client->contacts->list();

contacts.name: cURL
contacts.panelHtml:
POST
/v1/contacts
curl https://api.protocol.chat/v1/contacts \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer {token}" \
  -d username="FrankMcCallister" \
  -d phone_number="1-800-759-3000" \
  -d avatar_url="https://assets.protocol.chat/avatars/frank.jpg"

contacts.name: JavaScript
contacts.panelHtml:
POST
/v1/contacts
import ApiClient from '@example/protocol-api'

const client = new ApiClient(token)

await client.contacts.create({
  username: 'FrankMcCallister',
  phone_number: '1-800-759-3000',
  avatar_url: 'https://assets.protocol.chat/avatars/frank.jpg',
})

contacts.name: Python
contacts.panelHtml:
POST
/v1/contacts
from protocol_api import ApiClient

client = ApiClient(token)

client.contacts.create(
  username="FrankMcCallister",
  phone_number="1-800-759-3000",
  avatar_url="https://assets.protocol.chat/avatars/frank.jpg",
)

contacts.name: PHP
contacts.panelHtml:
POST
/v1/contacts
$client = new \Protocol\ApiClient($token);

$client->contacts->create([
  'username' => 'FrankMcCallister',
  'phone_number' => '1-800-759-3000',
  'avatar_url' => 'https://assets.protocol.chat/avatars/frank.jpg',
]);
